flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at University of West Florida are 14% below the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($49.1k vs $57.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of West Florida fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at University of West Florida rose 35% between 2021 and 2024 (34.8% → 47.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at University of West Florida rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 (52.0% → 58.8%).
